messages.content:
Create a retrieval-oriented summary for this section of a document.
Focus on what questions this section can answer: topics, entities, dates,
definitions, procedures, claims, tables, figures, metrics, and evidence types.
Do not invent facts. Return only the summary text.

Section metadata:
{
  "node_id": "0002",
  "title": "Singular 是新一代的归因和市场营销分析平台",
  "page_index": 4,
  "page_range": "4-5"
}

Section text:
Singular 是新一代的归因和市场营销分析平台 ，为营销人员提供可落地的洞察。
Singular 通过对投放于成千上万个渠道的营销漏斗顶层的活动数据进行收集、整
合和标准化，并与营销漏斗底层的归因数据相连接，帮助营销人员衡量他们所有
活动的每个用户触点的  ROI，借此进行最精细的优化。
Singular 的客户包括  X (Twitter) 、Airbnb 、微软、领英 , Lyft、IGG、Kakao 
Games 、Kika、Uber、河马游戏、 Shopify 、耐克、 WebToon 等。
官网： www.singular -cn.net
#1 用户评价最高
Singular 长期位居 G2平台上用
户评价最高的营销归因平台榜首
数十亿
每年通过 Singular 平台归因的
应用程序安装量达到数十亿次
1,000+
超过1,000 款增长最快的应用程
序都信赖 Singular ，将其作为
衡量市场表现的权威数据源
关注官方微信号
Singular
4

message.content: This section defines Singular as a next-generation marketing attribution and analytics platform that provides actionable insights. It details the platform’s core procedure: collecting, integrating, and standardizing top-of-funnel campaign data across thousands of channels, connecting it with bottom-of-funnel attribution data to measure per-user-touchpoint ROI and enable granular optimization. Key claims and metrics include ranking #1 as the highest user-rated marketing attribution platform on G2, processing billions of app install attributions annually, and serving as the authoritative performance data source for over 1,000 fast-growing applications. Notable client entities include X (Twitter), Airbnb, Microsoft, LinkedIn, Lyft, IGG, Kakao Games, Kika, Uber, 河马游戏, Shopify, Nike, and WebToon. Reference information includes the official website (www.singular-cn.net) and official WeChat account (Singular). Evidence types cited consist of third-party review platform rankings (G2), aggregate usage statistics, and enterprise client adoption lists. No specific dates, tables, or figures are explicitly detailed in the text.

Lists clients: X (Twitter), Airbnb, Microsoft, LinkedIn, Lyft, IGG, Kakao Games, Kika, Uber, 河马游戏 (Hippo Games), Shopify, Nike, WebToon. Provides official website: www.singular-cn.net. Highlights claims/metrics: #1 highest user-rated on G2 platform for marketing attribution; billions of app installs attributed annually; trusted by 1,000+ fastest-growing apps as authoritative data source. Mentions official WeChat account: Singular. Page number: 4.

2.  **Identify Key Elements for Retrieval-Oriented Summary:**
   - *Topics:* Marketing attribution, marketing analytics platform, ROI measurement, campaign optimization, top-of-funnel & bottom-of-funnel data integration.

   - *Dates:* None explicitly mentioned.
   - *Definitions:* Singular is defined as a next-generation attribution and marketing analytics platform that provides actionable insights.
   - *Procedures/Functions:* Collects, integrates, and standardizes top-funnel campaign data across thousands of channels; connects with bottom-funnel attribution data; measures ROI per user touchpoint; enables fine-grained optimization.
   - *Claims:* #1 highest user-rated marketing attribution platform on G2; trusted by 1,000+ fastest-growing apps; provides authoritative data for market performance measurement.
   - *Metrics:* Billions of app installs attributed annually; 1,000+ apps; #1 ranking on G2.
   - *Evidence Types:* Platform rankings (G2), client logos/names, usage statistics (billions of installs, 1,000+ apps).
   - *Contact/Links:* Official website (www.singular-cn.net), Official WeChat account (Singular).

It details the platform’s core procedure: collecting, integrating, and standardizing top-of-funnel campaign data across thousands of channels, connecting it with bottom-of-funnel attribution data to measure per-user-touchpoint ROI and enable granular optimization. Key claims and metrics include ranking #1 as the highest user-rated marketing attribution platform on G2, processing billions of app install attributions annually, and serving as the authoritative performance data source for over 1,000 fast-growing applications. Notable client entities include X (Twitter), Airbnb, Microsoft, LinkedIn, Lyft, IGG, Kakao Games, Kika, Uber, 河马游戏, Shopify, Nike, and WebToon. Reference information includes the official website (www.singular-cn.net) and official WeChat account (Singular). Evidence types cited consist of third-party review platform rankings (G2), aggregate usage statistics, and enterprise client adoption lists. No specific dates, tables, or figures are explicitly detailed in the text.
